title: selaginella atroviridis
intro: Selaginella atroviridis is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as a type of spikemoss or resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella atroviridis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, infusions, or tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
